ddls:
CREATE TABLE "journals" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal */,
  "issn" TEXT /* ISSN (International Standard Serial Number) of the journal */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal */,
  "publication_model" TEXT /* Publication model (e.g., Hybrid, Open Access) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the publication fee is charged */,
  "publication_fee" INTEGER /* Publication fee for submitting a manuscript */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the journal is published */,
  "frequency_of_publication" TEXT /* Frequency of publication (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  "editor_in_chief" TEXT /* Name of the editor-in-chief */,
  "chief_editor_email" TEXT /* Email of the editor-in-chief */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the author belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the institution */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the author */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID (Open Researcher and Contributor ID) of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "author_affiliations" (
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each affiliation */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the institution */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the author within the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("affiliation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manuscripts" (
  "manuscript_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manuscript */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal to which the manuscript was submitted */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who submitted the manuscript */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the manuscript */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the manuscript */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the manuscript was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the manuscript (e.g., submitted, under review, accepted, rejected) */,
  "review_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for completing the peer review process */,
  "manuscript_type" TEXT /* Type of manuscript (e.g., research article, review article) */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords related to the manuscript */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manuscript_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_manuscripts_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_manuscripts_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manuscript_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "manuscript_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manuscript associated with the file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the reviewer belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the institution */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Expertise areas of the reviewer */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID (Open Researcher and Contributor ID) of the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "manuscript_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manuscript being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer who conducted the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was completed */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the reviewer */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation (e.g., accept, reject, revise) */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the reviewer (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_manuscript_id FOREIGN KEY ("manuscript_id") REFERENCES manuscripts ("manuscript_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "manuscript_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manuscript that was published */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the manuscript was published */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume number of the publication */,
  "issue" INTEGER /* Issue number of the publication */,
  "page_numbers" TEXT /* Page numbers of the publication */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of citations received by the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_manuscript_id FOREIGN KEY ("manuscript_id") REFERENCES manuscripts ("manuscript_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoice" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "manuscript_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manuscript for which the invoice was generated */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal to which the manuscript was submitted */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who submitted the manuscript */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was generated */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the publication fee */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., paid, unpaid) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_manuscript_id FOREIGN KEY ("manuscript_id") REFERENCES manuscripts ("manuscript_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice for which the payment was made */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoice ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., author, reviewer, editor, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the journal or manuscript */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal being accessed */,
  "manuscript_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manuscript being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the journal or manuscript was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_manuscript_id FOREIGN KEY ("manuscript_id") REFERENCES manuscripts ("manuscript_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journal_licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal associated with the license */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of license (e.g., Creative Commons, Copyright) */,
  "license_text" TEXT /* Text of the license agreement */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the license */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the license */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_journal_licenses_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journal_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal associated with the metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., impact factor, citation count) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_journal_metrics_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journal_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal associated with the statistic */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic (e.g., number of submissions, number of publications) */,
  "stat_value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  "stat_date" TEXT /* Date the statistic was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_journal_statistics_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referee_invitations" (
  "invitation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invitation */,
  "manuscript_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manuscript associated with the invitation */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee invited */,
  "invitation_date" TEXT /* Date the invitation was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the invitation (e.g., accepted, declined, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invitation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_referee_invitations_manuscript_id FOREIGN KEY ("manuscript_id") REFERENCES manuscripts ("manuscript_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_referee_invitations_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "editor_decisions" (
  "decision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each decision */,
  "manuscript_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manuscript associated with the decision */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date the decision was made */,
  "decision" TEXT /* Decision (e.g., accept, reject, revise) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the editor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_editor_decisions_manuscript_id FOREIGN KEY ("manuscript_id") REFERENCES manuscripts ("manuscript_id")
)
